description: The Piromalli are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioia Tauro, Calabria. According to the DIA, they are the largest and most influential organized crime group in Western Europe, with over 400 allied families and thousands of affiliates. They have been active for over a century and are among the founders of the 'Ndrangheta. Their criminal activities include international drug and arms trafficking, agricultural fraud, and infiltration of the business sector.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2008 a El Mas Trader in Spagna viene arrestato dal ROS di Genova Ippolito Magnoli, esponente di rilievo dei Piromalli- Molè che gestiva il traffico di cocaina tra Colombia e Spagna
country_links.context: An important member was arrested in Spain who managed cocaine trafficking between Colombia and Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 23 luglio 2012 il faccendiere Aldo Miccichè è stato arrestato a Caracas, in Venezuela, nell'ambito dell'inchiesta “Cento anni di storia” contro la cosca Piromalli.
country_links.context: A Piromalli associate was arrested in Venezuela, indicating the clan's presence there.
